_comment: 리이오의 문제 해결지도 (industry-explorer/leeo-map.json 에서 이식). 쇼케이스의 '문제 해결 지도' 섹션으로 렌더링. slug 는 Data/apps/*.json 파일명, 앱 이름·링크는 빌드 시 포트폴리오 데이터에서 가져온다. 각 문제는 pain(불편)·who(누가)·when(언제)·gap(공백) 4단 구조 + En 번역.
title: 🍎 문제 해결 지도
intro: 리이오의 앱들이 실제로 푸는 문제를 테마별로 정리했습니다. 불편(Pain) → 누가 · 언제 → 기존 도구의 공백(Gap) 순으로 살펴보세요.
introEn: The real problems Leeo's apps solve, organized by theme. Explore each as pain → who · when → the gap in existing tools.

problems.pain: 일상 스트레스로 이완과 수면이 어려움
problems.painEn: Daily stress makes it hard to unwind and sleep
problems.whoEn: Stressed workers and people with insomnia
problems.whenEn: Before sleep or when needing rest
problems.gap: 고품질 자연 소리·가이드 명상 부재
problems.gapEn: No high-quality nature sounds or guided meditation

problems.pain: 나에게 맞는 소리 조합을 찾기 어려움
problems.painEn: Hard to find the sound mix that works for you
problems.whenEn: When focusing or falling asleep
problems.gap: 자유로운 사운드 믹싱 기능 부족
problems.gapEn: No free-form sound mixing

problems.pain: 복잡한 감정을 말로 표현·이해하기 어려움
problems.painEn: Complex emotions are hard to express and understand in words
problems.whoEn: People who need to manage their emotions
problems.whenEn: When reflecting on the day's emotions
problems.gap: 감정을 색으로 시각화하는 도구 부재
problems.gapEn: No tool that visualizes emotions as color

problems.pain: 감정의 흐름과 패턴을 파악하지 못함
problems.painEn: Can't see the flow and patterns of emotions
problems.whenEn: When checking how emotions change over time
problems.gap: 비판단적 감정 패턴 시각화 부재
problems.gapEn: No non-judgmental emotion-pattern visualization

problems.pain: 힘든 시기 극복 과정을 혼자 감당하기 벅참
problems.painEn: Getting through hard times alone is overwhelming
problems.who: 어려운 시기를 겪거나 극복 중인 사람
problems.whoEn: People going through or recovering from a rough patch
problems.whenEn: When wanting to record the recovery process
problems.gap: 회복 여정을 단계별로 남기는 안전한 공간 부재
problems.gapEn: No safe space to log the recovery journey step by step

problems.pain: 작은 진전이 눈에 안 보여 쉽게 좌절
problems.painEn: Small progress stays invisible, so discouragement comes easily
problems.whenEn: When wanting to see positive change
problems.gap: 회복 과정을 시각화하는 도구 부재
problems.gapEn: No tool that visualizes the recovery process

problems.pain: 버킷리스트가 잊혀지는 단순 체크리스트로 끝남
problems.painEn: Bucket lists end up as forgotten checklists
problems.whenEn: When setting a new dream or achieving one
problems.gap: 사진으로 여정을 남기는 시각적 기록이 없었음
problems.gapEn: No visual record of the journey in photos

problems.pain: 목표 달성 동기가 금방 사그라듦
problems.painEn: Motivation to reach goals fades fast
problems.whenEn: When wanting a daily reminder of the dream
problems.gap: 위젯·사진으로 동기부여하는 기능 부족
problems.gapEn: No widget or photo-driven motivation

problems.pain: 갔던 맛집을 기억 못하고 잊어버림
problems.painEn: Great restaurants get forgotten
problems.whoEn: People who love dining out and exploring restaurants
problems.whenEn: When logging a meal afterwards
problems.gap: 사진·평점을 모은 나만의 맛집 지도 부재
problems.gapEn: No personal restaurant map of photos and ratings

problems.pain: 대중 평점이 내 입맛과 맞지 않음
problems.painEn: Crowd ratings don't match your taste
problems.whenEn: When choosing where to go next
problems.gap: 내 기준의 개인 평가 기록 부재
problems.gapEn: No record of ratings by your own standards

problems.pain: 일주일을 어떻게 보내는지 한눈에 안 보임
problems.painEn: No at-a-glance view of how the week is spent
problems.whoEn: People reflecting on how they use time
problems.whenEn: When planning or reviewing the week
problems.gap: 일주일을 블록으로 시각화하는 도구 부재
problems.gapEn: No tool that visualizes the week as blocks

problems.pain: 하루의 동선이 기록으로 남지 않음
problems.painEn: The day's movements leave no record
problems.whoEn: People who want to log walks and travel
problems.whenEn: When reflecting on the day or reminiscing about a trip
problems.gap: 이동 경로를 발자국으로 남기는 일기 부재
problems.gapEn: No diary that stamps your path as footprints

problems.pain: 흐르던 생각이 끊겨 이어가지 못함
problems.painEn: A flowing train of thought gets cut off and lost
problems.whoEn: People who organize their thinking in notes
problems.whenEn: When continuing a thought as it comes
problems.gap: 생각을 이어가도록 돕는 메모장 부재
problems.gapEn: No notepad designed to continue a thought

problems.pain: 책을 읽다가 내가 좋아하는 문구를 적기 귀찮음
problems.painEn: Copying out your favorite passages by hand while reading is a hassle
problems.who: 책을 읽으며 문장을 모으고 싶은 사람
problems.whoEn: Readers who want to collect the sentences they love
problems.when: 종이책에서 마음에 드는 문장을 만났을 때
problems.whenEn: When you hit a passage worth keeping in a paper book
problems.gap: 표지 촬영으로 책을 자동 인식하고 문장만 형광펜처럼 스캔·소장하는 도구 부재
problems.gapEn: No tool that auto-identifies the book from its cover and scans just the highlighted sentence to keep

problems.pain: 매일 같은 텍스트를 반복 입력하며 시간 낭비
problems.painEn: Time wasted retyping the same text every day
problems.whoEn: Workers with heavy email and customer-support loads
problems.whenEn: When typing recurring phrases
problems.gap: 한 번에 붙여넣는 템플릿 입력 수단 부족
problems.gapEn: No one-tap template input

problems.pain: 생산성 향상이 추상적이라 체감 안 됨
problems.painEn: Productivity gains feel abstract, never tangible
problems.whenEn: Every time a template is used
problems.gap: 절약한 시간을 숫자·마일스톤으로 보여주는 성취감 부재
problems.gapEn: No numbers or milestones showing the time saved

problems.pain: iOS에서 저장한 클립을 맥에서 쓸 수 없음
problems.painEn: Clips saved on iOS can't be used on the Mac
problems.who: 반복 텍스트를 여러 기기서 쓰는 사람
problems.whoEn: People using recurring text across devices
problems.whenEn: When typing saved phrases on the Mac
problems.gap: iOS-맥 간 클립 데이터 연동 부재
problems.gapEn: No iOS–Mac clip syncing

problems.pain: 한 번 알림은 놓치면 끝이라 중요한 일을 놓침
problems.painEn: Miss the single notification and the important thing is gone
problems.whenEn: At important schedules and appointments
problems.gap: 두 번 알려주는 이중 안전망 부재
problems.gapEn: No double-alert safety net

problems.pain: 단일 알림은 ADHD·고령층에게 신뢰가 부족
problems.painEn: A single alert isn't reliable enough for ADHD users and seniors
problems.when: 잊기 쉬운 일을 상기해야 할 때
problems.whenEn: When recalling easily forgotten things
problems.gap: 유연한 간격의 재알림 부재
problems.gapEn: No flexible-interval re-alerts

problems.pain: 바쁜 일정 속 최적 시간 배분이 어려움
problems.painEn: Hard to allocate time optimally in a busy schedule
problems.whenEn: When scheduling and coordinating
problems.gap: AI가 최적 시간대를 제안하는 기능 부재
problems.gapEn: No AI suggesting the optimal time slot

problems.pain: 일정이 충돌해 스케줄이 꼬임
problems.painEn: Conflicting events tangle the schedule
problems.whenEn: When adding a new event
problems.gap: 충돌 없는 자동 시간 배분 부재
problems.gapEn: No conflict-free automatic time allocation

problems.pain: 발표 중 시간 관리가 어려움
problems.painEn: Managing time mid-presentation is hard
problems.whenEn: While presenting
problems.gap: 키노트와 함께 쓰는 타이머 부재
problems.gapEn: No timer that works alongside Keynote

problems.pain: 급히 찍은 발표 장표가 삐뚤어지고 사진첩에 뒤섞임
problems.painEn: Hastily shot slides come out crooked and get lost in the photo library
problems.whoEn: Audiences at lectures, seminars, and classes
problems.whenEn: When capturing slides during a talk
problems.gap: 장표 전용 촬영·정리 도구 부재
problems.gapEn: No dedicated tool for shooting and organizing slides

problems.pain: 연락처만으로는 관계의 맥락이 남지 않음
problems.painEn: Contacts alone keep no context of the relationship
problems.whenEn: When taking notes right after meeting someone
problems.gap: 만남·대화·약속을 기록하는 관계 도구 부재
problems.gapEn: No relationship tool that records meetings, conversations, and promises

problems.pain: 다음 만남 전 지난 대화가 기억나지 않음
problems.painEn: Can't recall the last conversation before the next meeting
problems.when: 재회 전 이전 기록을 확인할 때
problems.whenEn: When reviewing past notes before meeting again
problems.gap: 관계 유형별 맥락 관리 부재
problems.gapEn: No context management by relationship type

problems.pain: 도움 줄 멘토를 어디서 찾을지 모름
problems.painEn: No idea where to find a mentor who can help
problems.whenEn: When mentoring or advice is needed
problems.gap: 멘토의 위치를 찾는 연결 수단 부재
problems.gapEn: No way to locate and connect with mentors

problems.pain: 가족·팀의 일정이 흩어져 공유가 안 됨
problems.painEn: Family and team schedules stay scattered and unshared
problems.whenEn: When planning schedules together
problems.gap: 실시간 동기화되는 공유 플래너 부재
problems.gapEn: No shared planner with real-time sync

problems.pain: 서로 일정을 몰라 충돌·혼선 발생
problems.painEn: Not knowing each other's schedules causes conflicts and confusion
problems.whenEn: When checking who's doing what
problems.gap: 실시간 공유로 충돌을 사전 방지하는 수단 부족
problems.gapEn: No real-time sharing to prevent conflicts upfront

problems.pain: 아이에게 돈의 가치를 가르칠 방법이 마땅찮음
problems.painEn: No good way to teach kids the value of money
problems.when: 용돈을 주고 관리 습관을 들일 때
problems.whenEn: When giving allowance and building money habits
problems.gap: 집안에서 굴러가는 용돈 경제 시스템 부재
problems.gapEn: No allowance economy that runs inside the home

problems.pain: 집안 다툼이 감정싸움으로 번지고 억울함이 쌓임
problems.painEn: House disputes turn emotional and grievances pile up
problems.whoEn: Families who need rules and conflict resolution
problems.when: 가족 간 다툼이나 규칙을 정할 때
problems.whenEn: When settling family disputes or setting rules
problems.gap: 갈등을 놀이처럼 푸는 장치 부재
problems.gapEn: No playful way to clear the air

problems.pain: 장시간 화면 사용으로 눈 피로·건강 악화
problems.painEn: Long screen hours strain the eyes and health
problems.whoEn: Developers and office workers at screens all day
problems.whenEn: When deep in work and forgetting to rest
problems.gap: 20-20-20 규칙을 자동 관리하는 도구 부재
problems.gapEn: No tool that automates the 20-20-20 rule

problems.pain: 휴식이 필요한 걸 알아도 습관화 못함
problems.painEn: Knowing you need breaks doesn't make them a habit
problems.whenEn: When a break is due every 20 minutes
problems.gap: 배지·스트릭으로 휴식 습관을 만드는 장치 부족
problems.gapEn: No badges or streaks to build a break habit

problems.pain: 매일 먹은 것을 기록·관리하기 번거로움
problems.painEn: Logging every meal is a chore
problems.whoEn: People into dieting and health management
problems.whenEn: When logging quickly after a meal
problems.gap: 사진 기반 간편 기록과 AI 분석 부재
problems.gapEn: No photo-based quick logging with AI analysis

problems.pain: 식습관을 객관적으로 파악하지 못함
problems.painEn: No objective view of your eating habits
problems.whoEn: People who want healthier eating habits
problems.whenEn: When reviewing the week's meals
problems.gap: 긍정 피드백 중심의 식습관 분석 부재
problems.gapEn: No eating-habit analysis built on positive feedback

problems.pain: 햇빛을 얼마나 쬐었는지 감이 없어 일조량이 부족해짐
problems.painEn: No sense of how much sun you've had, so daylight quietly runs short
problems.who: 실내 생활이 길어 햇빛이 부족하기 쉬운 사람
problems.whoEn: People indoors so long they run low on sunlight
problems.whenEn: When working or studying indoors all day
problems.gap: 받은 햇빛을 기록·관리하는 도구 부재
problems.gapEn: No tool to log and manage the sunlight you get

problems.pain: 원하는 회화를 반복 연습할 방법이 마땅찮음
problems.painEn: No good way to drill the conversations you actually want
problems.whenEn: When drilling specific expressions
problems.gap: 원하는 회화를 반복 연습하는 도구 부재
problems.gapEn: No tool for repeating the conversations you choose

problems.pain: 인도네시아어 기초를 쉽게 배울 곳이 없음
problems.painEn: Nowhere easy to learn basic Indonesian
problems.whenEn: When picking up simple expressions
problems.gap: 간편한 인도네시아어 학습 도구 부재
problems.gapEn: No lightweight Indonesian learning tool

problems.pain: 연주 중 손이 바빠 메트로놈을 조작할 수 없음
problems.painEn: Hands are busy playing — no way to adjust the metronome
problems.when: 두 손으로 연주하며 박자를 맞출 때
problems.whenEn: When keeping time while playing with both hands
problems.gap: 손을 대지 않고 제어하는 메트로놈 부재
problems.gapEn: No metronome you can control without touching

problems.pain: 악보를 보고 음을 상상·확인하기 어려움
problems.painEn: Hard to imagine and verify the notes from a score
problems.when: 악보의 음을 직접 들어보고 싶을 때
problems.whenEn: When wanting to hear the notes on the page
problems.gap: 음표를 찍어 바로 들어보는 도구 부재
problems.gapEn: No tool to tap in notes and hear them instantly

problems.pain: 무미건조한 하루에 기분 좋은 한마디가 없음
problems.painEn: A dry day with no kind words in it
problems.whoEn: People who want a lift from wit and compliments
problems.whenEn: When tired or bored
problems.gap: 매일 새로운 주접·칭찬을 건네주는 앱 부재
problems.gapEn: No app that delivers fresh playful compliments daily

problems.pain: 평범한 사진을 개성 있는 픽셀아트로 못 만듦
problems.painEn: Ordinary photos can't become distinctive pixel art
problems.whenEn: When dressing up photos to share
problems.gap: 사진을 픽셀아트로 변환하는 간편 도구 부재
problems.gapEn: No simple photo-to-pixel-art converter

problems.pain: 내가 찍은 사진을 스티커로 만들기 번거로움
problems.painEn: Turning your own photos into stickers is a hassle
problems.whoEn: People who want stickers from their photos
problems.whenEn: When using a photo right after taking it
problems.gap: 촬영 즉시 스티커로 만드는 카메라 부재
problems.gapEn: No camera that makes stickers the moment you shoot

problems.pain: iMessage 대화에 개성 있는 표현 수단이 부족
problems.painEn: iMessage chats lack distinctive ways to express yourself
problems.whenEn: When expressing feeling and fun in messages
problems.gap: 새로운 스티커 표현 수단 부재
problems.gapEn: No fresh sticker expressions

problems.pain: 모임에서 다 같이 즐길 게임을 바로 시작하기 어려움
problems.painEn: Hard to get a game going that everyone can join on the spot
problems.whoEn: People at friend and family gatherings
problems.whenEn: When a group is looking for something to play
problems.gap: 근거리 통신으로 즉석 연결되는 파티 게임 부재
problems.gapEn: No party games that connect instantly over local networking

problems.pain: 아이 그림이 종이에 멈춰 있어 창작의 재미가 이어지지 않음
problems.painEn: A child's drawing stays frozen on paper, so the fun of creating fizzles
problems.whoEn: Parents encouraging their child's drawing and creativity
problems.whenEn: When drawing together with a child
problems.gap: 그림을 움직이게 만드는 쉬운 도구 부재
problems.gapEn: No easy tool that makes drawings move

problems.pain: 중요한 일정을 깜빡하고 놓침
problems.painEn: Important schedules slip the mind
problems.when: 이동 중 일정을 확인해야 할 때
problems.whenEn: When checking the schedule on the move
problems.gap: 아이폰에서 일정을 쉽게 보는 방법이 없었음
problems.gapEn: No easy way to see the schedule on iPhone

problems.pain: 마트마다 살 것이 달라 품목을 빠뜨리기 쉬움
problems.painEn: Different stores, different lists — items get missed
problems.whoEn: Regular grocery shoppers, from homemakers to singles
problems.whenEn: When checking the list at the store
problems.gap: 마트별 맞춤 리스트를 주는 도구 부재
problems.gapEn: No per-store custom shopping lists

problems.pain: 매번 앱을 열어 확인하기 번거로움
problems.painEn: Opening the app to check every time is a hassle
problems.whenEn: When checking quickly before shopping
problems.gap: 위젯·가족 공유로 앱 안 열고 보는 편의성 부족
problems.gapEn: No widget or family sharing to check without opening the app

problems.pain: 소중한 자유시간이 어떻게 사라지는지 자각 못함
problems.painEn: No awareness of how precious free time disappears
problems.whoEn: People whose evenings and leisure slip away
problems.whenEn: When looking back on the day's free time
problems.gap: 시간이 타서 사라짐을 시각적으로 보여주는 도구 부재
problems.gapEn: No tool that shows time visibly burning away

problems.pain: 언제 은퇴·퇴사할 수 있을지 막막함
problems.painEn: No idea when retiring or quitting becomes possible
problems.whoEn: Workers planning retirement or financial freedom
problems.whenEn: When reviewing financial goals and timing
problems.gap: 은퇴 가능 시점을 계산해주는 도구 부재
problems.gapEn: No calculator for a feasible retirement date

problems.pain: 기존 길찾기가 접근성이 부족해 이용이 어려움
problems.painEn: Existing navigation lacks accessibility and is hard to use
problems.whenEn: When finding the way in unfamiliar places
problems.gap: 접근성을 고려한 길찾기 도구 부재
problems.gapEn: No navigation designed with accessibility in mind

problems.pain: 복잡한 확률을 손으로 계산하기 번거로움
problems.painEn: Complex probabilities are tedious to work out by hand
problems.whoEn: People who need odds for games, stats, and decisions
problems.whenEn: When weighing odds of winning or success
problems.gap: 직관적인 확률 계산 도구 부재
problems.gapEn: No intuitive probability calculator

problems.pain: 종이로 오는 아이 일정을 옮겨 적다 빠뜨림
problems.painEn: Kids' paper schedules get lost while copying them by hand
problems.whoEn: Parents managing kids' notices and schedules
problems.whenEn: When a paper notice arrives from school
problems.gap: 종이 일정을 찍어 디지털로 관리하는 수단 부재
problems.gapEn: No way to snap paper schedules and manage them digitally

problems.pain: 여러 앱의 리뷰·평점이 흩어져 대응 우선순위를 못 정함
problems.painEn: Reviews and ratings scatter across apps, so triage is guesswork
problems.whenEn: When checking and answering reviews daily
problems.gap: 리뷰를 한곳에 모아 우선순위를 짚어주는 도구 부재
problems.gapEn: No tool that gathers reviews and points to today's priority

problems.pain: 색상 대비가 접근성 기준에 맞는지 눈대중으로 판단함
problems.painEn: Color contrast gets judged by eye against accessibility standards
problems.whoEn: Developers and designers responsible for color and accessibility
problems.whenEn: When choosing text and background colors
problems.gap: 대비 색상을 바로 확인하는 개발 도구 부재
problems.gapEn: No dev tool that shows contrast-safe colors instantly

problems.pain: 주니어의 실수가 반복되지만 배움으로 남지 않음
problems.painEn: Junior mistakes repeat but never turn into lessons
problems.whenEn: When a mistake leads to self-blame
problems.gap: 흔한 실수를 미리 배우는 자료 부재
problems.gapEn: No resource for learning common mistakes in advance
